intent: Write a trend-analysis brief on 'what Reddit wallstreetbets-adjacent users are buying with disposable income' versus what the storefront actually sells at those price points. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and video-games categories and collect at least 4 products priced above a reasonable splurge threshold (you decide, but note the threshold). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/wallstreetbets AND /f/gaming for posts that mention specific tech splurges, flex purchases, or 'YOLO' buying. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) propose a plausible splurge threshold and justify it, (b) present the storefront splurge items with data, (c) map each community splurge mention to whether the storefront stocks a comparable item, (d) conclude with observations on where community wants diverge from store availability. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Shopping (electronics + video-games) + Reddit (wallstreetbets + gaming). Trend mapping task, forces threshold reasoning.
